vocab.example: Most indoor plants require nutrient-rich soil to ensure they don't become stunted in their growth.
Understanding the germination process is crucial if you want to grow herbs from seeds successfully.

vocab.meaning: ánh nắng lốm đốm (nắng qua kẽ lá)
vocab.example: Tropical ferns generally prefer dappled sunlight rather than being exposed to harsh, direct rays.
I occasionally use foliar feeding to provide an immediate nutrient boost to my orchids.
Without proper drainage holes, water accumulates at the bottom, which often leads to root rot.

vocab.meaning: các loài cây có sức sống mãnh liệt (dễ thích nghi)
vocab.example: Beginners should start with resilient species like succulents that can withstand a bit of neglect.
It is essential to prune back dead branches to encourage the plant to produce new, healthy shoots.
Mixing compost or other organic matter into the ground can drastically improve the soil structure.

vocab.meaning: thích nghi với môi trường/khí hậu mới
vocab.example: When moving a plant from outdoors to indoors, you must let it gradually acclimatize to the lower light levels.

vocab.meaning: nhân giống từ cành chiết/cành giâm
vocab.example: One of the most rewarding aspects of gardening is learning how to propagate new plants from cuttings.
